div.head: The Secretary of State to the Ambassador in Brazil (Gibson)
div.p: 201. Your 323, November 29, 5 p.m. This Government regarded the notes of February 2 as interpretive and not requiring subsequent approval and confirmation by the President of the United States. The notes will be included with the President’s proclamation in this Government’s official publication of the Trade Agreement. The Department will be glad to have you furnish the Foreign Office the certified copies desired and sign the protocol of exchange including the sentence therein quoted in No. 323.
